rules.rule: finite local algebra contradiction invalidates affected theorem
branch tree undefined or nonconstructible invalidates leaf-world structure
unnormalized branch measure/amplitude invalidates probabilistic or quantum-like interpretation
failure to derive Born rule or replacement law blocks Everett-style ASH claims
no decoherence/separation mechanism blocks many-worlds/world-like branch claims
observer memories not embedded in branches invalidate commitment model
no branch-to-geometry bridge means no cosmology claim
no stable continuum/causal limit means no standard spacetime claim
matched controls reproduce branch signatures, removing ASH-specific attribution
cosmological observables cannot be computed from fixed equations, blocking empirical validation
prospective predictions revised after unblinding are invalid empirical evidence
